productDisplayName: Nike Men's Total90 Shoot White Shoe
description: Get ready to score those fantastic goals in these nike Total90 Shoot III HG-B men's Soccer Cleats. Designed to provide you with superior traction, support and ball control, these soccer shoes are a hot favourite.Upper Synthetic leather upper for lightweight comfort with uniform surface to facilitate shot accuracy at instep Textured screen on the upper to help spin the ball for swerve shot Black asymmetric lace-ups for snug Fit Appliqued swoosh logo on the side Midsole EVA sockliner for lightweight cushioning and to reduce cleat pressure Lightly cushioned collar for comfort and support Outsole Lightweight outsole with optimized cleat placement for traction and stability Firm-ground (FG) cleats for use on short-grass fields that may be slightly wet, but rarely muddy Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
